insights: Core financial reports are present, enabling baseline insurance dashboard analysis.
risks: More than half of key insurance KPIs are proxy-based; interpretation should be cautious.
fallback_recommendations: Combined Ratio lacks claim/opex signal; use solvency + liquidity trend charts as primary insight layer.
Replace stress curve with solvency and leverage gauges when liquid asset fields are missing.

checks.message: Insurance core timeseries available (>=4 periods).
insurance-tcdn specialized payload reachable.
Insurance KPI coverage and confidence quality.
Combined Ratio can be derived from available IS fields.
Stress-test series is available for liquidity risk insights.

insights: Leverage D/E=3.20x is within a manageable range for finance operators.
Current ratio=1.45x indicates acceptable short-term coverage.
fallback_recommendations: Use receivables-based credit proxy charts and label them explicitly as proxy.
Replace credit-cost chart with leverage + ROE/ROA trend from financial_ratios.
Use net margin and ROE decomposition instead of NIM where netInterestIncome is absent.

checks.message: Finco core timeseries available (>=4 periods).
Loan base available for credit metrics (loan book preferred, receivables proxy allowed).
Credit-cost/provision burden can be computed.
NIM-like earning metric can be derived (or fallback to net margin).
Leverage and liquidity lenses are available for ALM proxy insights.
